name: Airtasker Limited
analysis: ART has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 56% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.2100, stop A$0.1782, target A$0.2350 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
